race.comment: LIFE AFTER LOVE (8) pushed forward from a wide draw before sticking on well beaten 1.5L over 1100m at Kilmore. Peaks today and has the blinkers applied for the first time. Maps well enough and can break through for the premier yard. CRACKED IT (7) is also fourth up and she led and placed as favourite over 975m at Swan Hill last time. She's likely to control the race out of the inside gate and is sure to give a sight. DIMACHAERUS (12) was in the market at Echuca on debut but didn't fire. He'd prepared well for that, and the blinkers go straight on. Keep onside. SET BOOM (4) a big watch on debut from the favourable draw.
